title: Penguini Modded
description: Private pack for a create focused vanilla-esque experienced
body:
Penguini Modded is a 1.20.1 forge modpack that aims to expand upon the vanilla features without relying too heavily on tech mods.

The pack largely revolves around Create and it's expansions, but includes many worldgen, structure, and QOL mods to account for a variety of playstyles.
